info.name: Study Tracker API
info.description: REST API for Study Tracker with email verification, forgot-password code flow, and encoded ID support

request.description: Register account (initially inactive) and send verification email
Resend verification email for unverified user
Authenticate verified active user and get access token
Refresh access token using refresh token
Send 6-digit reset code to email (max one email every 30 minutes per user).
Verify reset code and set new password (max 5 successful resets per month).

query.description: Date for agenda (YYYY-MM-DD format, default: today)

request.description: Get daily stats and agenda for authenticated user
Get all categories (user-owned + system)
Get detailed topic info with all related tasks and practice logs

body.raw:
{
  "category_id": "{{category_id}}",
  "title": "Derivatives and Differentiation",
  "description": "Understanding the concept of derivatives and learning differentiation rules",
  "source_link": "https://example.com/derivatives",
  "difficulty": "medium",
  "first_study_date": "2026-03-27",
  "notes": "Start from limits and rules",
  "tags": ["calculus", "mathematics", "derivatives"]
}

request.description: Create new topic with automatic revision tasks (day 1, 7, 30, 90)
Mark topic as archived (soft delete)
Get tasks for a specific date, grouped by type (learn, revision, practice, overdue)
Mark a task as completed (locks scheduled date)
Reschedule task to a new date (not available if already completed)

query.description: problem_solving, implementation, reading, note_making, mock_interview, other

request.description: Get selected useful profile fields for authenticated user
Update profile fields (email cannot be changed).
Change current user password.
Get current user revision spacing configuration (or fallback defaults).
Replace user revision spacing configuration.
Reset user templates and fallback to system defaults.

variable.description: OAuth Password Grant client id (X-Client-Id header)
OAuth Password Grant client secret (X-Client-Secret header)
Email used for registration and verification
Verified active account email used for login
Encoded category id from API response
Encoded topic id from API response
Encoded task id from API response
Encoded practice log id from API response
Email used for forgot password flow
New password used in reset/change password endpoints
Current password for authenticated password change
